ticket.title: Ticket 1 — Rebrand paths, commands, and status identity

audit.summary: Rebrand code and docs are partially applied, but verification and required notes file were not completed before the turn limit.
Ticket 1 selesai dengan rebrand command/path/status ke `sheepdog`, legacy footer key dibersihkan, dan docs/README diselaraskan. `npm run check` lulus setelah memasang dependensi docs di worktree.
Diff melanggar standar persistensi state: saveState() masih write langsung ke file final tanpa short lock + temp file + rename atomik. Itu perlu dibereskan sebelum lolos axis standards.
Atomic lock+temp+rename state save sudah diimplementasi dan `npm run check` lulus, tetapi commit baru dan notes implementer belum sempat dibuat. Kontrak task retry ini jadi belum selesai penuh.
Menyelesaikan temuan reviewer dengan mempertahankan fix pending yang menambahkan lock singkat plus temp-file-rename atomik untuk `saveState()` Sheepdog. `npm run check` lulus.
Standards review clean. Diff follows CODING_STANDARDS.md for the dedicated Sheepdog command surface, dedicated paths, legacy footer cleanup, and locked atomic state writes.

Ticket 1 matches the requested rebrand scope: legacy command surface is removed, Sheepdog paths/status identity are in place, and README/docs were updated. `npm run check` passed in the task worktree.

audit.summary: Ticket 2 selesai: semua tampilan waktu yang user-facing sekarang pakai formatter lokal ramah manusia, dan self-check waktu sudah ditambahkan. Acceptance check penuh gagal karena `npm run check` mentok saat build docs: `astro: command not found`.

audit.summary: FAIL: handoff belum memenuhi CODING_STANDARDS karena `npm run check` masih gagal menurut catatan implementer. Perbaiki lingkungan/docs build sampai `docs:build` dan `check` benar-benar lulus sebelum handoff ulang.

Memperbaiki kegagalan handoff review dengan membuat `npm run docs:build` meng-install dependency docs saat `astro` belum ada di worktree fresh. Ticket 2 tetap scoped; `npm run self-check -- time && npm run check` sekarang lolos.
Diff mengikuti CODING_STANDARDS.md untuk axis standards; perubahan menjaga waktu human-facing tetap local-friendly dan check path tetap sederhana tanpa menambah abstraksi yang tidak perlu.

Ticket 2 matches the spec: human-facing wake times now use local friendly formatting in the footer, panel, and follow-up notification, while state keeps UTC ISO timestamps. `npm run self-check -- time && npm run check` passed in this worktree.

audit.summary: Resume found the pending implementer gone. Orchestrator ran `npm run self-check -- state && npm run check`; it failed in `scripts/self-check.mjs` with `ReferenceError: Bun is not defined`, and there is still no task commit, so the handover attempt is respawned.

State v3 persistence for sheepdog is now lock-guarded and atomic, with v2/v1-safe loading, startup silent expiry, and self-check coverage for sticky manual overrides plus concurrent scope merges. Required acceptance command passed cleanly after replacing the stale Bun-only self-check subprocess path with Node child processes.

attributes.checkCommand: npm run self-check -- state && npm run check

audit.summary: No standards violations found on the state v3 migration and self-check additions. The diff keeps the required lock + temp-file + rename state-write pattern and adds the required state merge/lock self-check coverage.

State v3 semantics still deviate from the spec: `originalSource` is being populated for migrated and auto-detected entries instead of only when an auto wake is later edited into a manual override. Checks passed, but this ticket is not yet spec-correct.
Fixed the spec retry so `originalSource` stays unset for migrated and auto-detected entries, while preserving manual-override behavior. Required self-check and repo checks passed.
